{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320152938C5270DCA0E0C5AA16F11"}"},"total":1097},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7373733100708168473","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔不错，剧情也很爽，比同类型的感觉要好看点，不知道后面会不会一样精彩，坐等"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716834020,"group_id":"7366870956771380248","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4hKrOnifl9E93RPW4ql51cuBbjX6m3ZHc+P+HpIStXS","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/774eccff17cf41e6922a92f02d351197~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537480&x-signature=2Tm%2BG9vo0BN4L5grh1CjZ%2Flr9Ow%3D","user_id":"2287425572582851","user_name":"白小鑫."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2287425572582851","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1709318218,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7366870956771380248","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越玄幻世界，苏玄成为北域帝族苏家少帝，且为东荒大衍圣地圣子，背景恐怖，天赋妖孽。
原以为，自己的人生就将这样朴实无华的进行下去，但令苏玄没有想到的是。
十八岁之时，系统觉醒。
而系统发布的第一个任务竟是让他成婚！
并且，这个成婚对象，系统还为他指定了！
那就是九天太清宫的圣女，冷若璃！
为了得到系统丰厚奖励，证道永恒。
苏玄下定决心，强娶冷若璃！
什么？不同意？
懂不懂北域苏家的含金量啊？！
在家族的支持与自己的努力之下，苏玄得偿所愿，娶到了冷若璃为妻。
“叮！成婚第一天，奖励混沌神魔体！”
“叮！成婚第二天，奖励六道轮回拳！”
......
“叮！成婚第五天，奖励万古天帝经！”
无敌，从成婚开始！
……
我叫冷若璃，乃是仙界女帝转世，本打算正常修炼，重回绝巅，以报前世之仇。
但没想到，我竟被一个叫苏玄的家伙求婚。
呵呵，作为女帝，我怎么可能嫁人？
但，偏偏那个苏玄背后的势力很大，直接拒绝会影响到我背后的势力。
因此，我提出比试，但没想到，我竟然把自己给搭进去了。
不过，那又如何？
身为女帝，我是不会屈服的……
渐渐，我发现了苏玄的不对。
恐怖的体质，无穷的神通，攀升的修为……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0ab27a60d28a186affbd18656269a6f3","author":"词穷","author_id":"","book_id":"7366870956771380248","book_name":"玄幻：成婚第一天，奖励混沌体","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#405058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7366917195751768600","read_count":"23045","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1000723"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"480","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,无敌,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7aec5484207ec310eeaa85486402924f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779175779&x-signature=eDEiPaz9chCBQBNxPJJz%2FqtILAM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1983994574409374","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"77"},"lo
